name: Odoo
description: Open-source business web suite for CRM, sales, inventory, accounting, websites, and internal apps.

envVars.description: Host path for custom Odoo addons

composeOverride:
# Generated by McHarbor App Store
services:
  {{serviceName}}:
    image: {{image}}
    container_name: {{containerName}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - {{serviceName}}-db
{{ports}}
    volumes:
      - {{env.ODOO_DATA_PATH}}:/var/lib/odoo
      - {{env.ODOO_ADDONS_PATH}}:/mnt/extra-addons
    environment:
      HOST: {{serviceName}}-db
      USER: {{env.ODOO_DB_USER}}
      PASSWORD: {{env.ODOO_DB_PASSWORD}}
  {{serviceName}}-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: {{containerName}}-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - {{env.ODOO_DB_PATH}}:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: postgres
      POSTGRES_USER: {{env.ODOO_DB_USER}}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{env.ODOO_DB_PASSWORD}}
